g.text: end_frame | int | 8 snapshot taken at wal_begin_read() before W1 commit
page_no | uint32 | 42 requested by OP_COLUMN in VDBE dispatch loop
W1 writer | -- | committed frames 9-12 AFTER R2 started
42 | 12 | W1 commit at t=2 (R2 started at t=0)
Snapshot Isolation: Same Page, Two Readers, Two Different Versions — Zero Locks
R2 end_frame=8 | sees pre-W1 DB version | started BEFORE W1 commit
R3 end_frame=13 | sees W1 WAL frame 12 | started AFTER W1 commit
W1 writer | appended frames 9-12 concurrently with both readers
Mechanism | end_frame integer is the snapshot marker — no mutex

text.tspan: // e.frame_idx == 12 -> most recent frame (written by W1)
// e.frame_idx == 12 -> most recent frame (written by W1)

g.text: Path A — YES: Frame Within Snapshot
Path B — NO: Frame Beyond Snapshot
Example: R3 started AFTER W1 commit (end_frame=13)
12 <= 13 | YES — frame is visible to R3
Our case: R2 started BEFORE W1 commit (end_frame=8)
12 > 8 | NO — frame is INVISIBLE to R2
Scan WAL Backward for Earlier Frame
return -1; // not in WAL within snapshot
